name: Green Salad with Thai Dressing
recipeIngredient: Chopped Fresh Red Thai Chile Pepper - see note
recipeInstructions:
1. In a food processor, combine the liquid ingredients: peanut oil, rice vinegar, and lime juice. Blend until well emulsified.
2. Add brown sugar, fresh cilantro, and chopped red Thai chile pepper to the food processor.
3. Process for a few seconds to incorporate these flavors.
4. Add sliced green onions, peanut butter, and roasted peanuts. Pulse briefly to combine.
5. Taste and adjust seasoning by adding more liquid, peanut butter, or other ingredients as desired.
6. Serve the dressing on the side with the salad, and provide extra chopped peanuts, cilantro, and green onions for personalization.
